1.2.1.description:
**Version 1.2.1:**

_Archipelago Changes:_

- Fixed the client not noticing that it was disconnected
- Added new option for deathlink amnesty
- Tweaked logic for shapes and tools (with help from an algorithm)
1.2.1.title: v1.2.1

1.3.0.description:
**Update 1.3.0**

_Archipelago Changes:_

- Fixed receiving compatibility chips counting as actions
- Removed already-found locations on connect
- Updated setup instructions
- Added a flashbang trap
- Fixed chip pack logic
- Accounted for completion shape and needed patterns in completion condition logic
- Made the randomize compatibility chips option default to true
- Fixed some option configurations not generating correctly
1.3.0.title: v1.3.0
